holdings.name: TCS
holdings.description: India's quality flagship. 40%+ EBITDA margin, 55%+ ROCE, near-zero debt. Consistent dividend payer with buyback track record. Quality factor anchor.

holdings.name: Infosys
holdings.description: Second-largest IT quality blue chip. 30%+ EBITDA margins, 35%+ ROCE. Consistent earnings and dividend. GenAI via Infosys Topaz platform.

holdings.name: HUL
holdings.description: Consumer quality benchmark. 50%+ ROCE, 20%+ net margin, 5%+ dividend yield. Low earnings variability across economic cycles.

holdings.name: Nestle India
holdings.description: Maggi monopoly with zero long-term debt. 60%+ ROCE. Premium portfolio of Munch, KitKat, Nescafe. Consistent quality scoring.

holdings.name: Asian Paints
holdings.description: Duopoly paints market leader. 60%+ gross margins, asset-light distribution. B2C brand moat. Quality perennial inclusion.

holdings.name: Bajaj Finance
holdings.description: India's highest-quality NBFC. 20%+ ROE, 400M+ customer data asset. Consumer lending with proprietary credit models.

holdings.name: Titan Company
holdings.description: Watches, jewellery, eyewear — premium aspirational consumer. 25%+ ROCE, consistent cash generation. Tata Group quality governance.

holdings.name: HDFC Bank
holdings.description: Quality banking franchise. 16-18% ROE, 1.1-1.2% RoA, lowest NPA among peers. Consistent dividend. Largest private bank by market cap.

holdings.name: Wipro
holdings.description: IT services with consistent quality metrics. Capital allocation discipline — recurring buybacks. Diversified BFSI, healthcare and energy verticals.

holdings.name: Pidilite Industries
holdings.description: Fevicol monopoly in wood adhesives. Consumer and construction segments. 35%+ ROCE with low debt. Massive distribution network.
